title: lespedeza cytisoides var. subsericea
intro: Lespedeza cytisoides var. subsericea, also known as the Korean bushclover, is a perennial legume native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lespedeza cytisoides var. subsericea include its potential to help manage diabetes, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or used in tinctures, with some herbalists also drying the leaves and flowers for later use in infusions.
